economic_notes: Ditidaht Economic Development Limited Partnership and General Partner Inc. are GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. On June 30, 2021, Ditidaht First Nation transferred all partnership units in Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood Limited Partnership to NCN Holdings Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic noted as potential operational risk.
notes: ISC funding flows through Nuu-Chah-Nulth Tribal Council via Comprehensive Funding Arrangement — direct ISC amount not separately disclosed. Total government transfers estimated from identifiable government sources: Nuu-Chah-Nulth Tribal Council $5,126,170 + BCTC $710,038 + FNESC $682,870 + FCRSA $381,625 + Aboriginal Head Start $166,556 + Province of BC $539,500 = $7,606,759; however share of income from GBEs is negative ($311,755) and Other revenue includes non-government items. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. 5 housing units secure a Bank of Montreal mortgage. Deferred revenue increased significantly. Consolidated entity includes 3 fully consolidated funds and 2 GBEs on modified equity basis plus Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood Development Corporation shares.
